name: Braids
description: Digital macro-oscillator with 40+ synthesis models spanning virtual-analog, FM, formant, wavetable, physical modeling, and noise. OLED menu exposes scale, drift, trigger-delay, and signature parameters.

controls.name: MODEL (encoder/knob)
controls.description: Selects synthesis algorithm from 40+ models. Encoder scrolls menu; push selects.
controls.detail: 40+ models · includes CSAW, VOSM, FM, PLUK, STRN, DRUM, NOIS, etc.

controls.name: COARSE
controls.detail: Quantized to semitone when SCALE is active

controls.name: TIMBRE
controls.description: Model-dependent primary tone parameter. Generally sweeps brightness or spectral density.
controls.detail: CV summed with attenuverter-scaled TIMBRE jack

controls.name: COLOR
controls.description: Model-dependent secondary tone parameter. Character or sub-parameter per model.

controls.name: META (switch)
controls.description: Routes FM CV to model selection instead of pitch — allows CV-driven model morphing.
controls.detail: OFF: FM jack = pitch FM · ON: FM jack = model selection

controls.name: FM Attenuverter
controls.description: Scales and inverts the FM CV input (pitch or model depending on META).
controls.detail: CCW: invert · noon: zero · CW: unity

controls.name: TIMBRE Attenuverter
controls.description: Scales and inverts the TIMBRE CV input.

inputs.name: TRIG
inputs.description: Fires internal short AD envelope (VCA+brightness) and retriggers physical models. Resets wavetable phase on some models.

inputs.name: FM
inputs.description: Frequency or MODEL modulation depending on META switch. Scaled by FM attenuverter.

inputs.name: TIMBRE
inputs.description: TIMBRE parameter CV, scaled by TIMBRE attenuverter.

inputs.name: COLOR
inputs.description: COLOR parameter CV. Unattenuverted — attenuate externally if needed.

outputs.name: OUT
outputs.description: Main audio output of selected synthesis model.

behaviors.name: META mode (CV-driven model morphing)
behaviors.trigger: META switch ON + CV on FM jack
behaviors.description: FM CV selects model instead of pitch. Slow CV sweeps through timbres; stepped CV picks discrete models. Attenuverter sets morph range.

behaviors.name: Internal AD envelope
behaviors.description: TRIG fires a short internal envelope that ducks amplitude and brightness — adds percussive attack without external VCA. Physical models use TRIG as the exciter/strike.

behaviors.name: SCALE quantizer (menu)
behaviors.description: Built-in quantizer locks V/OCT and COARSE to selectable scales (chromatic, major, minor, Japanese, raga, etc.). Makes Braids self-quantizing against random or imprecise CV sources.

behaviors.name: SIGNATURE (lo-fi bitcrush)
behaviors.description: Signature parameter progressively downsamples and bit-reduces the output for deliberate aliased/lo-fi textures. Levels 1–4 range from subtle grit to heavy 8-bit character.

behaviors.name: DRIFT (analog-style detune)
behaviors.description: Adds slow random pitch drift simulating analog VCO instability. Makes digital oscillator feel breathing/alive, especially when stacked with external VCOs.

behaviors.name: AD envelope shaping (AD parameter)
behaviors.description: Menu exposes separate attack/decay times for the internal envelope, plus timbre-mod amount (ATIM) and color-mod amount (ACOL). Enables a self-contained voice without external envelopes.

behaviors.name: Trigger-delay (TDLY)
behaviors.description: Delays internal trigger processing to compensate for upstream sequencer-or-envelope latency. Tightens stacked hits when sequencing from modules with slower edges.

behaviors.name: Paques easter egg
behaviors.description: Hidden Paques (Easter) model added in firmware 1.9 for April Fools — available when certain menu conditions are met. Part of Braids' lore and exposed in later firmwares.

patchIdeas.name: Self-contained percussive voice
patchIdeas.patch: Model: DRUM (bass drum or snare) · SIGN 2 for crunch · TRIG from clock · V/OCT fixed · internal AD shapes hit · OUT direct to mixer · one cable sequenced drum
patchIdeas.diagram:
Braids:
* Model: DRUM/BD
* Menu: SIGN 2

- Clock (Out) t> Braids (TRIG)
- Braids (OUT) -> Mixer (In)

patchIdeas.name: META-morphing texture
patchIdeas.patch: META switch ON · slow LFO into FM jack · FM attenuverter sets model sweep range · TRIG from clock so model changes are sampled on each edge · timbre evolves rhythmically across model groups
patchIdeas.diagram:
Braids:
* META: ON

- Keyboard (Pitch) p> Braids (V/OCT)
- Slow LFO (Out) >> Braids (FM) // selects model
- Clock (Out) t> Braids (TRIG)
- Braids (OUT) -> Filter (In) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Drifting analog-style bass
patchIdeas.patch: Model: CSAW or VOWL · DRFT menu at 2 · SIGN at 1 for subtle aliasing warmth · sequencer on V/OCT · envelope into TIMBRE CV for filter-like sweep · feels like a vintage VCO
patchIdeas.diagram:
Braids:
* Model: CSAW
* Menu: DRFT 2, SIGN 1

- Sequencer (Pitch) p> Braids (V/OCT)
- Sequencer (Gate) g> Envelope (Trig)
- Envelope (Out) >> Braids (TIMBRE)
- Braids (OUT) -> Filter (In) -> VCA (In) -> Output (In)
- Envelope (Out) >> VCA (CV)

patchIdeas.name: Plucked string with quantized random
patchIdeas.patch: Model: PLUK · SCALE = pentatonic · random CV into V/OCT is quantized by Braids' internal quantizer · clock on TRIG fires pluck · no external quantizer needed
patchIdeas.diagram:
Braids:
* Model: PLUK
* Menu: SCAL = PENTATONIC

- Noise (Out) >> S&H (In)
- Clock (Out) t> S&H (Trig)
- S&H (Out) p> Braids (V/OCT) // Braids quantizes internally
- Clock (Out) t> Braids (TRIG)
- Braids (OUT) -> Reverb (In) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: FM bell with bitcrush
patchIdeas.patch: Model: FM · COARSE set for bell register · SIGN at 3 (heavy bitcrush) · TIMBRE CV from envelope modulates FM index · COLOR slow-swept by LFO for evolving timbral motion · 8-bit DX-style bells
patchIdeas.diagram:
Braids:
* Model: FM
* Menu: SIGN 3

- Sequencer (Pitch) p> Braids (V/OCT)
- Sequencer (Gate) g> Envelope (Trig)
- Envelope (Out) >> Braids (TIMBRE)
- LFO (Out) >> Braids (COLOR)
- Envelope (Out) >> VCA (CV)
- Braids (OUT) -> VCA (In) -> Reverb (In) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Wavetable scanning pad
patchIdeas.patch: Model: WTBL · slow LFO on TIMBRE scans wavetable X · slow LFO (different rate) on COLOR scans Y · V/OCT from sustained chord · DRFT 1 adds breathing motion · lush evolving pad
patchIdeas.diagram:
Braids:
* Model: WTBL
* Menu: DRFT 1

- Keyboard (Pitch) p> Braids (V/OCT)
- LFO 1 (Out) >> Braids (TIMBRE)
- LFO 2 (Out) >> Braids (COLOR)
- Braids (OUT) -> Stereo Chorus (In) -> Reverb (In) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Filtered noise drone
patchIdeas.patch: Model: NOIS or METL · V/OCT sets filter frequency of the model · slow LFO on COLOR modulates resonance · SIGN at 0 keeps signal clean · sustained noise-based texture
patchIdeas.diagram:
Braids:
* Model: NOIS

- LFO 1 (Out) >> Braids (TIMBRE)
- LFO 2 (Out) >> Braids (COLOR)
- Offset (Out) p> Braids (V/OCT) // fixed tonal center
- Braids (OUT) -> Reverb (In) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Trigger-delay drum compensation
patchIdeas.patch: Model: DRUM/SN · sequencer with slow gate edges · menu TDLY set to compensate · Braids hits fall exactly on grid · useful when paired with slower sequencers or gate sources
patchIdeas.diagram:
Braids:
* Model: DRUM/SN
* Menu: TDLY = 4

- Sequencer (Gate) t> Braids (TRIG)
- Sequencer (Pitch) p> Braids (V/OCT)
- Braids (OUT) -> Mixer (In)
